creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
======================
Description:
======================

The following attachment not only updates pexpect from 2.1 to 2.3, but it also corrects the plist so 3 other additional modules are compiled and made available (ANSI, FSM, and screen).

======================
PoC:
======================
[gcooper@optimus /scratch/pexpect-2.3/examples]$ ./bd_serv.py
Sat Sep 27 19:12:35 2008
Login for gcooper@127.0.0.1:1664
password:
server started with pid 24576
created shell. command line prompt is \[PEXPECT\][\$\#]
Listen
Accept
screen poll updater started in background thread

^Z
[1]+  Stopped                 ./bd_serv.py
[gcooper@optimus /scratch/pexpect-2.3/examples]$ kill %1
[gcooper@optimus /scratch/pexpect-2.3/examples]$ jobs
[1]+  Terminated: 15          ./bd_serv.py

Fix: See attached files for updated distinfo, plist, and Makefile.

Patch attached with submission follows:
